CustomField.description: SOQL Queries usage with visual indicator. Shows percentage of limit consumed with warning (80%) and danger (90%) thresholds.
CustomField.formula: IF(LimitsSoqlQueriesMax__c = 0, "✅ N/A", IF(LimitsSoqlQueriesConsumed__c / LimitsSoqlQueriesMax__c >= $CustomMetadata.UoWLimitsThreshold__mdt.SoqlQueries.TransactionRedPercent__c / 100, "⛔", IF(LimitsSoqlQueriesConsumed__c / LimitsSoqlQueriesMax__c >= $CustomMetadata.UoWLimitsThreshold__mdt.SoqlQueries.TransactionAmberPercent__c / 100, "⚠️", "✅") ) & " " & TEXT(ROUND(LimitsSoqlQueriesConsumed__c / LimitsSoqlQueriesMax__c * 100, 1)) & "% (" & TEXT(LimitsSoqlQueriesConsumed__c) & " / " & TEXT(LimitsSoqlQueriesMax__c) & ")" )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: SOQL Queries usage with visual indicator. Shows percentage of limit consumed with warning (80%) and danger (90%) thresholds.
CustomField.label: SOQL Queries
